name: swiftserve
description: Capability truth for Swift packages: what a package actually serves, per Apple platform and Linux, derived from parsed source with evidence permalinks.

interface.shortDescription: Check what Swift packages actually support, per platform
interface.longDescription: Before adding a Swift dependency, ask SwiftServe whether it actually serves the capability you need on your target platform — noise cancellation on macOS, charts on visionOS, haptics on watchOS. Verdicts are derived from parsed source at pinned versions with evidence permalinks, plus dependency-health review and private-API detection for App Store rejections (ITMS-90338). Works with zero install over the hosted static JSON index; the CLI adds offline scans and CI gates.
defaultPrompt: Can LiveKit do noise cancellation on macOS? Check SwiftServe before answering.
